candidates_proposed.name: Carnatic Chamber Concerts
candidates_proposed.rationale: Carnatic Chamber Concerts (CCC) runs monthly Carnatic music events at Shirdi Sai Parivaar Multipurpose Auditorium in Milpitas (1221 California Circle), providing a high-cadence platform for Bay Area youth classical musicians. Also organizes the annual Bay Area Kala Utsavam festival. Monthly events confirmed for May and December 2026. Not in existing registry. High volume (≥12 events/year) of pure Desi classical music content. NOTE: WebFetch was blocked by egress policy for this run; event data verified via WebSearch.

candidates_proposed.name: India Community Center (ICC) Milpitas

sample_events.title: ICC and Javanika's Bay Area's Biggest Antakshari Competition

candidates_proposed.rationale: India Community Center is one of the Bay Area's most active South Asian community venues, located at 525 Los Coches St, Milpitas. The center hosts weekly/bi-weekly cultural programming including music performances, competitions, open mics, comedy, film screenings, and festival celebrations. Confirmed 6+ distinct events in a 5-month window (June–October 2026). Not in registry. Strong ongoing cadence of Desi community events. NOTE: WebFetch was blocked by egress policy; events verified via WebSearch.

candidates_proposed.name: South India Fine Arts (SIFA)

sample_events.title: Shanmukha – The Lord Of Victory (Grand Musical Production)
Carnatic Vocal Concert – Abhishek Raghuram & Shashank Subramanyam

candidates_proposed.rationale: SIFA is the Bay Area's premier Carnatic classical arts organization, founded 45+ years ago. Hosts high-profile annual events (Thyagaraja Aradhana, SIFA Festival) and individual artist concerts at venues including Quinlan Community Center Cupertino and Santa Clara Convention Center. Three confirmed 2026 events found. Monthly event estimate is low (~1/month) so does not meet registry cutoff of ≥3, but the organization is legitimate and high quality. Not in registry. NOTE: WebFetch blocked by egress policy; data verified via WebSearch.

candidates_proposed.name: Abhinaya Dance Company of San José

sample_events.title: Arangetrams of Namitha Shenoy and Diya Shah

candidates_proposed.rationale: Abhinaya Dance Company is a professional Bharatanatyam company based in San José, dedicated to South Indian classical dance. Multiple 2026 performances confirmed including solo recitals and festival appearances (Yuva Bharati 20th anniversary). Contact email abdanceco@gmail.com confirmed active. Monthly event estimate ~1 own production/month; does not meet registry ≥3 cutoff. Organization is real and active. NOTE: WebFetch blocked; data from WebSearch.

candidates_proposed.name: AIA Events – Association of Indo Americans
candidates_proposed.rationale: AIA Events (Association of Indo Americans, 501c3) has been organizing South Asian cultural festivals in the Bay Area for 25+ years. Events include Indian Culture Parade, Saree Walk, Holi, Diwali – large outdoor festivals at Cesar Chavez Park San Jose. Two specific 2026 events confirmed. Monthly estimate is ~1 (annual/semi-annual major events); does not meet ≥3 registry cutoff. High community visibility but low frequency. NOTE: WebFetch blocked; data from WebSearch.

candidates_proposed.name: OSAAT (One School At A Time)

sample_events.title: Naatya Raaga 2026 – Indian Classical Music and Dance Contests

candidates_proposed.rationale: OSAAT organizes annual Indian classical music and dance events (Naatya Raaga, Raag Rang) that attract hundreds of Bay Area youth artists. Annual cadence only (~2 events/year) does not meet the ≥3/month registry cutoff. Confidence also below 0.70 threshold. Notable charity organization funding rural schools in India through art events. NOTE: WebFetch blocked; data from WebSearch.

candidates_proposed.name: Chitresh Das Institute

sample_events.title: Chitresh Das Dance Company – Upcoming Kathak Performance

candidates_proposed.rationale: Chitresh Das Institute is a premier Kathak dance school and company serving San Francisco, San Mateo, and Cupertino. Has an active calendar page at chitreshdasinstitute.org/calendar and listed on Yelp as recently updated May 2026. Shows like 'Veil of Janki Bai' and 'Invoking the River' are in repertoire, but no specific 2026 performance dates were extractable via WebSearch. Extraction score 0.4 due to low structured data found. Below both extraction and confidence thresholds for registry. NOTE: WebFetch blocked; only general info from WebSearch.

candidates_proposed.name: Navarasa Dance Theater

sample_events.title: EKA Festival – Navarasa as Guest Artists

candidates_proposed.rationale: Navarasa Dance Theater offers Bharatanatyam, Kalaripayattu martial arts, and Yoga classes in San Jose and SF Bay Area, with occasional public performances. Only one specific 2026 event found (EKA Festival September 28) plus mention of Nov/Dec holiday shows. Low structured event data; extraction_score 0.4. Monthly estimate ~1. Does not meet extraction or confidence cutoff for registry. Primarily a school; public performances are infrequent. NOTE: WebFetch blocked; data from WebSearch.

candidates_rejected.name: Kalanjali Dances of India
candidates_rejected.notes: Berkeley-based Bharatanatyam school with a calendar page, but no specific 2026 public events found via WebSearch. Only a library performance was mentioned with no date. Appears to primarily serve students; insufficient public event cadence to verify.
